name: explore_6e_d320
hypothesis: 6 experts at dim=320. Smaller model, more experts. Tests expert count vs dimension trade-off at the narrow end.
changes_summary: NUM_EXPERTS=6, MODEL_DIM=320, NUM_HEADS=8 (fixed: 320%8=0), NUM_KV_HEADS=4 (2:1 GQA ratio). Originally had NUM_HEADS=6 which crashes (320%6=2).
